ext_description.message: Send browser downloads to Motrix Next — a modern download manager powered by aria2
ext_description.description: Extension description shown in browser and web store

popup_status_connected.description: Connection status badge when aria2 RPC is reachable

popup_status_disconnected.description: Connection status badge when aria2 RPC is unreachable

popup_status_not_configured.description: Connection status badge when RPC secret is empty

popup_no_active_tasks.description: Message when there are no active aria2 tasks

popup_action_pause_all.description: Button to pause all active downloads

popup_action_resume_all.description: Button to resume all paused downloads

popup_action_settings.description: Button to open the options page

popup_action_launch.description: Button to launch the desktop app when disconnected

popup_action_open.description: Button to focus the desktop app when already connected

popup_error_unreachable.description: Error message when RPC is unreachable

popup_error_check_settings.description: Button to navigate to settings when connection fails

options_rpc_port_label.description: Label for the RPC port input

options_rpc_secret_label.description: Label for the RPC secret input

options_test_connection.description: Button to test the RPC connection

options_section_behavior.description: Settings section for download interception behavior

options_enabled_label.description: Toggle label for enabling/disabling download interception

options_enabled_desc.description: Description text for the interception toggle

options_min_size_label.description: Label for minimum file size filter

options_min_size_desc.message: Skip files smaller than this threshold
options_min_size_desc.description: Description text for minimum file size input

options_fallback_desc.message: Resume download in browser if aria2 fails
options_fallback_desc.description: Description text for the fallback toggle

options_section_rules.description: Settings section for per-site download rules

options_add_rule.description: Button to add a new site rule

options_section_enhanced.description: Settings section for optional enhanced permissions

options_enhanced_cookies_label.description: Toggle label for cookie forwarding to aria2

options_enhanced_hide_bar_label.description: Toggle label for hiding the browser download UI

options_enhanced_granted.description: Status when enhanced permissions are active

options_section_diagnostics.description: Settings section for diagnostic event log

options_diagnostics_copy.description: Button to copy diagnostic events as JSON

notification_sent_title.description: Notification title when download is sent

notification_sent_body.description: Notification body when download is sent

notification_failed_title.description: Notification title when download send fails

notification_fallback_title.description: Notification title when falling back to browser download

context_menu_download.description: Context menu item for downloading a link with Motrix Next

popup_speed_active_count.description: Number of active downloads in speed bar

popup_error_hint.message: Make sure Motrix Next is running and RPC is enabled.

options_rules_empty.description: Placeholder when no site rules exist

options_enhanced_description.message: Grant additional permissions for cookie forwarding and hiding the browser download bar.

options_enhanced_cookie_note.message: Cookie forwarding is best-effort — it may not work for all sites due to browser privacy policies.

options_enhanced_status_granted.description: Status text when enhanced permissions are active

options_diagnostics_empty.description: Placeholder when diagnostic log is empty

options_unsaved_title.description: Dialog title when leaving with unsaved changes

options_unsaved_message.message: You have unsaved changes. Save before leaving?
options_unsaved_message.description: Dialog body when leaving with unsaved changes

options_changes_indicator.description: Indicator text showing there are unsaved modifications

options_color_scheme.description: Label for the color scheme picker

error_rpc_unreachable.message: Cannot connect to Motrix Next RPC
error_rpc_unreachable.description: Error when the RPC endpoint is unreachable

error_rpc_auth.description: Error when the RPC secret does not match

error_rpc_timeout.description: Error when the RPC connection times out

options_rule_always_intercept.description: Site rule action: always intercept downloads

options_rule_always_skip.description: Site rule action: never intercept downloads

options_rule_use_global.description: Site rule action: follow the global setting

task_name_unknown.description: Fallback name when a task filename cannot be resolved

popup_error_auth.description: Popup banner title when RPC secret is incorrect

popup_error_auth_hint.message: Check that the RPC secret in Settings matches your Motrix Next configuration.
popup_error_auth_hint.description: Popup banner hint for RPC auth error

popup_error_timeout.description: Popup banner title when RPC connection times out

popup_error_timeout_hint.message: Check your network or firewall settings. RPC port: $1
popup_error_timeout_hint.description: Popup banner hint for timeout error, $1 = port number

popup_error_unreachable_hint.message: Make sure Motrix Next is running. RPC port: $1
popup_error_unreachable_hint.description: Popup banner hint for unreachable error, $1 = port number
